# awscc_resiliencehubv2_service_function (Resource)

Creates a service function within a Resilience Hub service.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `criticality` (String) The criticality of the service function.
- `name` (String) The name of the service function.
- `service_arn` (String) The ARN of the parent service.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the service function.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the service function was created.
- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.
- `resource_count` (Number) The number of resources associated with this function.
- `service_function_id` (String) The server-generated service function ID.
- `source` (String) The source of the service function.
- `updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the service function was last updated.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_resiliencehubv2_service_function.example
  identity = {
    service_arn         = "service_arn"
    service_function_id = "service_function_id"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `service_arn` (String) The ARN of the parent service
- `service_function_id` (String) The server-generated service function ID

#### Optional

- `account_id` (String) AWS Account where this resource is managed
- `region` (String) Region where this resource is managed

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_resiliencehubv2_service_function.example
  id = "service_arn|service_function_id"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import awscc_resiliencehubv2_service_function.example "service_arn|service_function_id"
```
